executor_steps: Remove the entire annex agree block from ADIRU.EMV2
Add a new annex agree block to the ADIRU system type
In the new annex agree block, remove all guarantee statements that reference non-existent ports
In the new annex agree block, remove all assume statements that reference non-existent components
Move the annex agree block to be a direct child of the ADIRU system type declaration
